name: agent-ops
description: Author, operate, and review full-spectrum agentic systems and the repos they live in — agent loops & teams, the control plane, harness & context engineering, agentic-workflow UX, and repo memory/docs (AGENTS.md · README · CHANGELOG · ROADMAP · ADRs) + architecture review — with a named-practitioner council and verifiable gates (loop blueprints, audit ledgers).
